user.title: Add MHI air conditioner
user.description: Create a climate entity linked to a native Home Assistant infrared emitter.

data_description.base_frame_hex: A 19-byte MHI base frame as hexadecimal. The default is the frame used by the tested ZSA-series remotes.
data_description.temperature_sensor: Optional sensor shown as the climate entity current temperature.
data_description.humidity_sensor: Optional sensor shown as the climate entity current humidity.

error.invalid_base_frame: The base frame must be valid hexadecimal that decodes to exactly 19 bytes.
error.invalid_emitter: Select an available infrared emitter entity.

abort.no_emitters: No native infrared emitter entities were found. Install and configure an infrared emitter integration first.

init.title: MHI IR Climate options
init.description: Update the linked infrared emitter, model profile, base frame, or room sensors.

data_description.base_frame_hex: A 19-byte MHI base frame as hexadecimal. The default is the frame used by the tested ZSA-series remotes.
data_description.temperature_sensor: Optional sensor shown as the climate entity current temperature.
data_description.humidity_sensor: Optional sensor shown as the climate entity current humidity.

error.invalid_base_frame: The base frame must be valid hexadecimal that decodes to exactly 19 bytes.
error.invalid_emitter: Select an available infrared emitter entity.
